title: Padikasu Nathar Temple
tagline: Padikasu Nathar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Padikasu Nathar Temple (also called Swarnapureeswarar Temple) is a Hindu temple located at Azhagaputhur, a village in the Thanjavur district of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Padikasu Nathar Temple (also called Swarnapureeswarar Temple) is a Hindu temple located at Azhagaputhur, a village in the Thanjavur district of Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshiped as Padikasunathar, and is represented by the lingam. His consort Parvati is depicted as Soundaranayagi. The presiding deity is revered in the 7th century Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil saint poets known as the nayanars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam.

topPlaces.name: Andarkoil Swarnapureewarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Andarkoil Swarnapureewarar Temple (ஆண்டார்கோயில் சொர்ணபுரீசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located in the village of Andankoil in Valangaiman taluk of Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Sivagurunathaswamy Temple
topPlaces.description: Sivagurunathaswamy temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in the village of Aduthurai, Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshipped as Sivagurunathaswamy, and is represented by the lingam.

topPlaces.name: Enanallur
topPlaces.description: Enanallur is a village in Kumbakonam taluk, Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Karuvalarcheri Agastheeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Karuvalarcheri Agastheeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Karuvalarcheri in Thanjavur district of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Sivapuram, Thanjavur
topPlaces.description: Sivapuram is a village in Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu. It is located 5 kilometres south-east of Kumbakonam.

topPlaces.name: Villiyavarambal
topPlaces.description: Villiyavarambal is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Natchiarkoil
topPlaces.description: Natchiarkoil is a neighbourhood in Kumbakonam of Thanjavur district of Tamil Nadu state in the peninsular India. Nachiarkoil lamps, which are made of brass, are produced locally.

topPlaces.name: Thirunarayur Nambi Temple
topPlaces.description: Nachiyar Kovil or Thirunarayur Nambi Temple is a Sri Vaishnava Hindu temple in Thirunarayur, a village in the outskirts of Kumbakonam in the southern Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is dedicated to Niladevi, an aspect of the goddess Lakshmi, and her consort Vishnu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Padikasu Nathar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Padikasu Nathar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Padikasu Nathar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (81 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (82 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Padikasu Nathar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Padikasu Nathar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Padikasu Nathar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Padikasu Nathar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Padikasu Nathar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Andarkoil Swarnapureewarar Temple, Sivagurunathaswamy Temple, Enanallur, Karuvalarcheri Agastheeswarar Temple, Sivapuram, Thanjavur.
